bookSourceComment:
更新日志请点击登录，更新书源中查看

基础使用教程：
1、搜索：
    1)基础搜索：在发现页长按该书源，点击搜索，直接搜，搜索范围(全部来源小说)
    2)进阶搜索：在登陆-书源设置中选择指定模式/来源，可搜索指定模式/来源内容
    3)快捷搜索：使用特殊关键词(x,t,m,d,@)搜索
         x:书名@来源  如(x:十日终焉@番茄)
         t:书名@来源  如(t:十日终焉@番茄)
         m:书名@来源  如(m:十日终焉@番茄)
         d:书名@来源  如(d:十日终焉@番茄)
         其中：x表示小说(可省略)，t表示听书，m表示漫画，d表示短剧
         冒号支持中文英文
         
2、发现页：
    在书源设置中选择指定模式或者单个来源，然后刷新发现页即可
    
3、更多使用方式长按发现页书源选择登录一目了然
4、用户后台有视频教程
exploreUrl:
<js>
var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_tab') || getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || '小说';
var sources =  getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || '番茄';


function checkEnv() {
    let isModified = false;
    try {
        new Packages.io.legato.kazusa.utils.TimeoutCancellationException('');
        isModified = true;
    } catch (e) {
        isModified = typeof source.loginUi == 'function' ? false : true;
    }

    return isModified;
}

var islyc = checkEnv();
let device_type = '安卓';
try {
	  try {
	  java.qread();
	  device_type ="轻阅读";
	  } catch {
	  	java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
	  	}
    
} catch (e) {
    try {
        java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (islyc && device_type == '安卓'){
	sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_source') || sources;
	setArguments('find_source', sources);
	}
var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];


var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架" + fqssionid);
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};



qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url + '/get_book_shelf,' + qtop;

let qtsj = [];

if (islyc && device_type == '安卓') {
    try {
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "线路",
            host,
            base_url,
            "server",
            1
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "模式",
            ["小说", "听书", "短剧", "漫画"],
            tab,
            "find_tab",
            0.33
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "频道",
            ["男频", "女频"],
            source_type,
            "source_type",
            0.33
        ));
        let source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '书旗', '塔读', '江湖', '小米', '米读', 'QQ阅读', '酷我小说','幻梦轻小说', '西瓜小说', '69书吧', '顶点', '爱下电子书', '伪69', '超会专属小说', '番薯小说', '阅友小说', '笔趣阁22', '微山书院', '中华典藏', '老福特'];
        if (tab == '听书') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '喜马拉雅', '酷我'];
        }
        if (tab == '漫画') {
            source_list = ['全面漫画', '番茄', '包子漫画', '歪瑞古德', 'G社漫画'];
        }
        if (tab == '短剧') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '河马', '旺旺短剧'];
        }
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "平台",
            source_list,
            sources,
            "find_source",
            1
        ));
       const excludeTitles = ['点击登录可切换来源', '切换后长按刷新即可'];
       style_list = style_list.filter(item => !excludeTitles.includes(item.title));
    } catch {}
} else {
	if (device_type == '安卓'){
	qtsj.push({
        "title": "下载阅读Σ最新测试版",
        "url": '{\{java.longToast("本书源推荐使用最新版洛娅橙改版阅读Σ\\n请安装后重新导入书源");java.startBrowser("https://loyc.xyz/c/legado.html#download","下载阅读Σ最新测试版");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1
        }
    })}
	}

qtsj.push({
    title: "大灰狼个人中心",
    url: qtsjurl,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
    }
})

var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key3 = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key3 = "";
}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key3) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            cookie.removeCookie(h);
            cookie.removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key3 + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

    item_id: item_id,
    source: sources,
    tab: tab,
    tone_id: tone_id,
    variable: varia,
    version: '4.11.5.1'
};

var content_url = '/content';
if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读" || sources == "QQ阅读" || sources == "svip_QQ阅读") && fqpara && tab == "小说") {
    content_url = '/content?review=1';
}

//var signInfo = generateComplexSignature('POST', content_url, {}, APP_SECRET, params);


//var signedParams = copyObject(params);
//signedParams.timestamp = signInfo.timestamp;
//signedParams.nonce = signInfo.nonce;
//signedParams.sign = signInfo.sign;


var op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: JSON.stringify(params),
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    }
};

op = JSON.stringify(op);
java.log(op);
java.log(cookie.getCookie(base_url))
data = java.ajax(base_url + content_url + `,${op}`);
try {
    data = JSON.parse(data);
    if (data.msg) {
        java.toast(data.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {}
content = data.content

if (close_img == 'on') {
	content = removeAllImgTags(content);
	}

if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读" || sources == "QQ阅读" || sources == "svip_QQ阅读") && fqpara == "on" && tab == "小说") {
    var sdtoken;
    try {
        var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
        sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
    } catch (e) {
        sdtoken = '';
    }
    var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
    var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
    var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
    var fqssionid = '';
    if (!fqcookie) {} else {
        fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
    }
    content = content
        .replace(/ident="/g, 'ident="' + base_url)
        .replace(/book_id=/g, 'book_id=' + book_id + '&ssionid=' + fqssionid);
    if (device_type == "苹果") {
        content = paraForiOS(content, sources);
    } else {
        content = paraForAndroid(content, sources,islyc);
    }
}
data = JSON.stringify({
    content: content,
});
if (device_type == "安卓" && (tab == "短剧" || tab == "视频" || sources.includes('毒舌影视') || sources.includes('NT动漫'))) {
    data = {
        content: `【右上角刷新】开启播放(下一集请切换下一章刷新)\n播放直链：\n${content}`,
    };
    data = JSON.stringify(data);
    if (book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index) {
        let video_url = `${base_url}/online_video?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}`;
        if (sources.includes('毒舌影视') || sources.includes('NT动漫')) {
            video_url = content;
        };
        java.startBrowser(video_url, title);
        java.toast("正在加载视频...");
    }

}
data;

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
if (res.method) {
    res = Object.fromEntries(
        res.body
        .replace("source", "sources")
        .split("&")
        .map((query) => query.split("="))
    );
    res.url = "";
}
let book_id = res.book_id;
java.put('book_id', book_id);
let tab = res.tab;
let sources = res.sources;
let url = res.url;
let html = "";
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
        let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);    
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    //java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

           java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

let tab = result.tab;
let sources = result.source;
let title = result.title;
let item_id = result.item_id;
let book_id = java.get("book_id");
let url = result.toc_url || "";
let qtcontent = {
    book_id: book_id,
    item_id: item_id,
    title: title,
    sources: sources,
    tab: tab,
    url: url,
};
qtcontent = java.base64Encode(JSON.stringify(qtcontent));
if (sources == '卷') {
    content_url = item_id
} else if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && tab == "小说") {
    var base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server") || "";
    var sdtoken;
    try {
        var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
        sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
    } catch (e) {
        sdtoken = '';
    }
    var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
    var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
    var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
    var fqssionid = '';
    if (!fqcookie) {} else {
        fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
    }
    let sourcess = sources.replace('svip_', '');
    content_url = `data:;base64,${qtcontent},{"type":"qingtian3","js":"book ? result : '${base_url}/get_review?book_id=${book_id}&item_id=${item_id}&ssionid=${fqssionid}&source=${sourcess}'"}`;
} else {
    content_url = `data:;base64,${qtcontent},{"type":"qingtian3"}`;
}
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'sources') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

bookSourceComment:
幻梦轻小说API书源
密码：huanmengapi

TG交流群：https://t.me/huanmengnovel

由于一直疯狂被人举报免费书源、软件、QQ群，所以QQ群以后长期禁言

幻梦轻小说全网最齐全的轻小说网，访问速度优质而且网页内置插图，拥有海量的轻小说书籍，如果有网页bug或者需求的小说可以进网站群及时反馈


作者留言：

1.0更新：本网站所有的小说都是免费的，目前已经有了PC端和wap端，APP端目前还有点问题需要调试

本次初次制作好了对接阅读的书源，但是为了避免被大规模盗刷流量，书源暂时没有对接插图

2.0更新：本次更新解决了插图问题，让书源可以显示插图，显示不出来多刷新就行

站长在Cdn处新增速率限制，超过限制会被拉黑，国外地区也会无法访问插图，非官网访问也会无法访问插图

如果后续阅读方面流量过于异常，我会关闭阅读的阅读插图渠道，希望各位可以理解

2.1更新：新增发现页面的选项功能，用户可以更快速便捷的从分类和题材中寻找自己想要的小说

2.2更新：修复发现页面的分类功能异常的问题，现在移除文库分类

2.3更新：修复发现界面过于拥挤，点击作者无法快速搜索作者，总有几本推荐阅读始终占据分类书籍顶部的问题，这里感谢QQ用户雪隐梅香提供的修复


2.4更新：优化了插图排版的问题，如果插图不是一张图片一页，可以尝试在阅读界面右上角手动把图片样式改为SINGLE

2.5更新：本次网站将图床更换为了下行宽带300M，上行200M的大宽带服务器，方便大家更快的使用。与此同时修复了更换图床后，插图异常不显示的问题

2.6更新：网友修改优化版本，由于海外线路需要人机交互，修复了海外线路被阻拦，无法使用书源的问题

2.7更新：修复阅读app下载过快，会触发拉黑的问题，限制并发

2.8更新：兼容苹果用户的读不舍手书源，修复目录异常的问题

注意：

此书源支持苹果用户的TF测试版的读不舍手

以前书源版本可能会出现目录没有文章，或者显示异常

我没有苹果手机，也无法测试和写书源，能够适配一个苹果书源我已经尽力了，大家见谅


2.9更新：上调并发率，并发率太低可能会出现图片加载异常，太高会导致被拉黑

3.0更新：在发现功能中，新增一个【最新】按钮功能，自动索引获取时间戳最新入库50本小说

4.0大更新：本次服务器大优化，配置翻倍到8C8G

全面重写书源，将书源对接改为端口对接，可以设置密码杜绝恶意传播/傻福使用

新增分享页超50+选项

对接信息页信息功能，修复信息页简介丢失异常。

5.0大更新：
新增接口密码，接口错误无法访问与获取网站内容

新增对接书籍屏蔽，同步网站下架与屏蔽手机下架书籍

初步对接阅读文章页章节内容，但插图还有一些问题

新增对接标签获取，信息页可以更好的展示更多信息。

6.0大更新：
修复拦截与加密导致的书源插图失效

修复下架的搜索拦截问题

修复目录获取拦截，文内下架提示异常问题

新增Cloudflare拦截内置浏览器验证功能

重写后端接口，修复部分信息提供，避免编码转换导致插图异常

7.0大更新：
优化后端图片类型的格式，加快图片加载速度（暂不适配苹果书源，会出现没图片的情况）

优化插图部分的限速问题

优化文章内容页的限速问题

修复目录页上限100章的后端异常问题

重写端口优化多层嵌套问题，大幅度提高搜索与加载能力，提升速度2~5倍


更多详情内容，可以关注：www.huanmengacg.com

APP下载链接：https://h5.cloud.189.cn/share.html#/t/MRNR7nEBVZZj%EF%BC%88%E8%AE%BF%E9%97%AE%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%9A0jn0%EF%BC%89

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
if(baseUrl.match(/zongheng/)){var bookId = baseUrl.match(/bookId=(\d+)/)[1];

JSON.parse(String(result))
  .chapterlist.chapters.filter(o => !o.chapterName.includes('作品相关'))
  .map(o => {
    return {
      name: o.chapterName.replace(/^正文\s+/, ''),
      url:
        'http://huayu.zongheng.com/chapter/' +
        bookId +
        '/' +
        o.chapterId +
        '.html',
      vip: o.level > 0
    };
  });
}

else {doc=org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
list=doc.select("#chapterlist a,#kui-book-show a,#list a,.list li,#cul a,#chapters-list a,.novel_list a,.dccss a,.book_list a,.mulu ul li a,.listCont dd a,.listmain a,.read a,#list-chapterAll dd a,.chapter a,.section-box ul a,.directoryArea a,.ul_catalog a,.zjlist dd a,.catalog_ls a,#uls li,.list-charts a,#newlist a");
a=list.toArray().reverse().sort().map(x=>({name:x.text(),
url:x.attr('href')}));
}</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
p=java.getString('a[href~=down]@href')
result=java.ajax(source.key+p)
//java.log(result)
$ = java.getString(".bookbutton@html", result);
n = 0; 
v = String(book.getVariable("custom"));
x = v.match(/^\d+$/)? v : n;
x = parseInt(x) < $.length? x : n;
java.toast(x);

name=java.getString('[property="og:novel:book_name"]@content');
author=java.getString('[property="og:novel:author"]@content');
last=java.getString('[property~=las?test_chapter_name]@content');
kind=java.getString('[property~=category|status|update_time]@content');
img=java.getString('[property="og:image"]@content');

if (v == 0) {
  bookUrlz = java.getString('a.-5@href',result);
} else if(v==1){
  bookUrlz = java.getString('a.-4@href',result);
}
intro = "  简介：" + java.getString('[property="og:description"]@content') + "\n当前源链: " + bookUrlz+"\n文件简介:🔺'+0+'🔻"+java.getString("a.-5@href", result)
+
"\n文件链接:🔺'+1+'🔻"+java.getString("a.-4@href", result)

data = {
	name:name,
	author:author,
	kind:kind,
	last:last,
  intro: intro,
  img: img,
  bookUrl: bookUrlz
};

JSON.stringify(data);
</js>

//定义一个空列表，存最终结果
var reultJson=[];
var AddJson =function(title,listMap){
manDuf=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(titleduf));
manDuf.title=title;
reultJson.push(manDuf);

listMap.forEach((obj)=>{
j = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(urlduf));
j.title = obj.title;
var Obj = {
categoryId: obj.categoryId,
genderId: obj.genderId,
statusId:obj.statusId,
wordcountId:obj.wordcountId,
sortId:obj.sortId
};
function GFG_Fun() {
return (url.replace(/categoryId|genderId|statusId|wordcountId|sortId/gi, function (matched) {
return Obj[matched];
}));
}
j.url = GFG_Fun()
reultJson.push(j);
})
}
AddJson("无CP",typesList);
AddJson("双女主",typesList1);
JSON.stringify(reultJson);

loginUrl:
<js>
function browserLogin() {
  try {
    java.startBrowserAwait(
      "https://qidian.com", 
      "登录"
    )
  } catch (e) {}
  let ywkey = cookie.getKey("qidian.com", "ywkey")
  let ywguid = cookie.getKey("qidian.com", "ywguid")
  putLoginHeader({
  	  guid: ywguid,
  	  key: ywkey
  })
  cookie.removeCookie("qidian.com")
  // java.toast("没做完:(")
}

function login() {}

function tokenLogin() {
  if (source.getLoginInfoMap() == null) {
    java.toast("未获取到LoginInfoMap，请尝试重新打开登录UI再按一遍")
  }
  putLoginHeader({
    guid: source.getLoginInfoMap()["ywguid"],
    key: source.getLoginInfoMap()["ywkey"]
  })
  java.toast("凭据保存成功")
}

function proxyExcWrapper(fun) {
  try {
    fun()
  } catch (e) {
    java.log(e.toString() + "\n" + e.stack)
  }
}

function empty() {
  java.toast("别点了，用来看的")
}
</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
var Regs = [/bookId=(\d+)/i, /\.com\D+?\/(\d+)/i, /(\d+)/i];
var bookId = "";
for (let Reg of Regs) {
    let mat = baseUrl.match(Reg);
    if (mat) {
        bookId = mat[1];
        break;
    }
}
java.ajax(QDSign("v2/bookdetail/get", [
    "bookId=" + bookId
]))
</js>

ruleContent.content: let info = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result)) let content = "" let header = getLoginHeader() switch (info.source) { case "qd": let bid = java.hexDecodeToString(java.ajax(book.tocUrl)) let cid = info.cid if (info.isVip) { let url = `https://ksapp.qidian.com/ajax/chapter/getInfo?debug=1&bookId=${bid}&chapterId=${cid}&_csrfToken,` + JSON.stringify({ headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 8.1.0; MI PAD 4 Build/OPM1.171019.019; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/90.0.4430.226 KsWebView/1.8.90.612 (rel) Safari/537.36 NetType/wifi Language/zh miniProgram/1.60.0 KUAISHOU/11.5.30.31599 aegon/3.32.2', Connection: 'Keep-Alive', 'platformType': 'android', Referer: 'https://miniapi.ksapisrv.com/', 'content-type': 'application/json', Cookie: `ywguid=${header.guid}; ywkey=${header.key}` } }) let body = JSON.parse(java.log(java.ajax(url))).data let user = body.user body = body.chapterInfo content = body.content if (body.vipStatus && !body.limitFree && !body.isBuy) { content += ("\n=============\n试读结束，继续阅读请 [购买]\n本章价格: " + body.price + "点") } } else { let request = QDSign("v2/bookcontent/safegetcontent", [ "bookId=" + bid, "chapterId=" + cid ], "", true) let body = getBytes(request.url, request.headers) let decrypt = dContentQD(cid, body) let raw = JSON.parse(decrypt) let cArr = raw.Content.split("\r\n") let blocks = {} for (let i of raw.Blocks) { blocks[i.Sort] = i } for (let i = 0; i < cArr.length; i++) { content += cArr[i] + "\n" if (blocks[i + 1] && blocks[i + 1].Type == "image") content += `\n` } } } content

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
// 验证码处理 v2 by 酷安@靈狐
// 使用腾讯OCR请设置tx_cookie
// 腾讯OCR有次数限制
// 登录地址https://cloud.tencent.com/login?s_url=https%3A%2F%2Fcloud.tencent.com%2Fproduct%2Focr
// 如果获取不到相关cookie就上传图片识别

// 代码最佳运行环境是在书籍列表页
// 移植其他地方可能会出现bug
// 如果搜索会跳转详情页请完善详情页正则
// 滑到最下面传入参数需要更改

var ocr=true // 是否启用ocr，关闭后手动输入，对于手动输入请开启CookieJar或在请求头手动设置一个cookie（部分网站不适用）
var mode=0
/*
0:"百度_通用"
1:"百度_高精度
2:"百度_网络图片"
3:"腾讯_通用"
4:"腾讯_高精度"
5:"腾讯_手写"
6:"腾讯_英语"
*/
var save=false // 是否缓存验证码供多次使用

var toast_level=2
/*
	0:关闭toast弹窗
	1:显示错误消息
	2:显示全部
*/

var tx_cookie={
	'uin':'',
	'skey':''
}
var header=source.header||''
header=JSON.parse(header!=''?header:'{}')
function concat(o,split){
	let result=''
	for(i in o){
		let v=o[i]
		v=v&&'='+java.encodeURI(v)||''
		result+=result==''&&i+v||split+i+v
	}
	return result
}
tx_cookie=String(concat(tx_cookie,';'))
var Ocr={
tencent:function(base64,mode){
	let extra,params,action,data,body,res,json
	extra={
	 "LanguageType":"en",
		//"IsPdf":true,
		"ImageBase64":"data:image/jpeg;base64,"+base64
	}
 params={
		"ToModule":"ocr",
		"Extra":JSON.stringify(extra)
	}
 action=[
  'GeneralBasicOCR',
  'GeneralAccurateOCR',
  'GeneralHandwritingOCR',
  'EnglishOCR'
 ]
 params.ToAction=action[mode||0]
 body=JSON.stringify(params)
 data={
		"Action":"OcrDemo",
		"CloudEnv":"Formal",
		"Region":"ap-guangzhou",
		"Params":JSON.stringify(params)
		}
	body=JSON.stringify(data)
	res=java.post('https://ocr.smartform.cloud.tencent.com/ocr/forward/cloud',body,{cookie:tx_cookie})
		json=JSON.parse(res.body()).Response
		data=json.Data
		let result=''
		if(data){
			json=JSON.parse(data).Response.TextDetections
			for(i in json){
				result+=json[i].DetectedText
			}
		}else{
			this.msg=json.Error.Message
		}
		return result
},
baidu:function(base64,mode){
	let data,body,type,url,res,json
	data={
		image:'data:image/jpeg;base64,'+base64,
		image_url:null,
		type:'https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/',
		detect_direction:false,
		language_type:'ENG'
		}
		type=[
		 'general_basic',
		 'accurate_basic',
		 'webimage'
		]
		data.type=data.type+type[mode||0]
		body=concat(data,'&')
		let result=''
		url='https://ai.baidu.com/aidemo'
		res=java.post(url,body,{'referer':url})
		json=JSON.parse(res.body())
		if(json.errno==0){
		 json=json.data.words_result
		 for(i in json){
			 result+=json[i].words
		 }
		}else{
			this.msg=json.msg
		}
		return result
},
get:function(base64){
	let result
 if(mode<3){
 	 result=this.baidu(base64,mode)
 	}else{
 		result=this.tencent(base64,mode-3)
 	}
 	if(this.msg){
 		java.log(this.msg)
 		if(toast_level>0){
 			java.toast(this.msg)
 		}
 		this.msg=null
 	}
 return result
 }
}
function imgToBase64(imgUrl){
	let res=org.jsoup.Jsoup.connect(imgUrl).ignoreContentType(true).ignoreHttpErrors(true).execute()
	header['cookie']=String(concat(res.cookies(),';'))
	let base64=Packages.cn.hutool.core.codec.Base64.encode(res.bodyAsBytes())
	return base64
}
function Url(u){
	if(!u.match('^http')){
		u = source.getKey()+'///'+u
	}
	u = u.match(/(https?:\/\/)(.+)/)
	u = u[1]+u[2].replace(/\/+/,'/')
	return u
}
function auto(o){
	let base64,yzm,msg,body,res
	if(save&&try_times==0){
		yzm=cache.get('yzm')
		let temp=cache.get('cookie')
		if(temp){
		 header.cookie=temp
		}
	}
	if(!yzm){
	 if(ocr){
	  base64=imgToBase64(Url(o.img))
	  yzm=Ocr.get(base64).replace(/[^\w]/g,'')
	  if(yzm!==''){
	   msg='识别验证码：'+yzm
	   java.log(msg)
	   if(toast_level>1){
	    java.toast(msg)
	   }
	  }
	 }else{
		 yzm=java.getVerificationCode(Url(o.img))
	 }
	}
	if(save){
		cache.delete('yzm')
		cache.delete('cookie')
		cache.put('yzm',yzm)
		cache.put('cookie',header.cookie)
	}
	for(i in o.data){
		if(!o.data||o.data[i]==''){
			o.data[i]=yzm
		}
	}
	body=concat(o.data,'&')
	method=o.method.toLowerCase()
	if(method=='post'){
	 res=java.post(Url(o.action),body,header)
	}else{
		res=java.get(Url(o.action+'/?')+body,header)
	}
	let jump=res.header("Location")
	jump=jump&&Url(jump)
 if(jump){
  	// 主要用在动态获取更新html，不需要可直接
  	// result='验证码'
 	 result=java.ajax(jump)
	 if(jump.match(source.bookUrlPattern)){
		 java.put('src',result)
		 source.bookUrlPattern=''
		 info=source.bookInfoRule.init
		 js="<"+"js>java.get('src')</"+"js>"
		 source.bookInfoRule.init=js+info
		 toc=source.tocRule.chapterList
		 source.tocRule.chapterList=js+toc
		 result=''
	 }
 }else{
 	 result=res.body()
 	}
	return result
}
max_try=10
try_times=0
while(result.match('验证码')){
 img=java.getString('img@src')
 input=java.getElement('input')
 data={}
 for([i,node] of Object.entries(input)){
		data[node.attr('name')]=node.attr('value')
	}
	u=java.getString('form@action')
 result=auto({
  action:u,
	 method:'post',
	 img:img,
	 data:data
	})
	/*上面是动态获取例子，以下是手动填入例子
	auto({
		action:"gut.php", // 提交数据地址
		method:'post', // 提交方式
		img:'captcha.php', // 验证码图片
		data:{ // 提交参数键值对
			search:'系统', // 搜索关键字
			captcha:'' // 识别为空的关键字为验证码
	 }
	})
	搜索关键字不从网页获取就用java.put('key',key)和java.get('key')
	已经很简单了，再不会打屁屁
	*/
if(try_times>=max_try){break}
try_times+=1
}
result
</js>

		if(!o.data||o.data[i]==''){
			o.data[i]=yzm
		}
	}
	body=concat(o.data,'&')
	method=o.method.toLowerCase()
	if(method=='post'){
	 res=java.post(Url(o.action),body,header)
	}else{
		res=java.get(Url(o.action+'/?')+body,header)
	}
	let jump=res.header("Location")
	jump=jump&&Url(jump)
 if(jump){
  	// 主要用在动态获取更新html，不需要可直接
  	// result='验证码'
 	 result=java.ajax(jump)
	 if(jump.match(source.bookUrlPattern)){
		 java.put('src',result)
		 source.bookUrlPattern=''
		 info=source.bookInfoRule.init
		 js="<"+"js>java.get('src')</"+"js>"
		 source.bookInfoRule.init=js+info
		 toc=source.tocRule.chapterList
		 source.tocRule.chapterList=js+toc
		 result=''
	 }
 }else{
 	 result=res.body()
 	}
	return result
}
max_try=10
try_times=0
while(result.match('验证码')){
 img=java.getString('img@src')
 input=java.getElement('input')
 data={}
 for([i,node] of Object.entries(input)){
		data[node.attr('name')]=node.attr('value')
	}
	u=java.getString('form@action')
 result=auto({
  action:u,
	 method:'post',
	 img:img,
	 data:data
	})
	/*上面是动态获取例子，以下是手动填入例子
	auto({
		action:"gut.php", // 提交数据地址
		method:'post', // 提交方式
		img:'captcha.php', // 验证码图片
		data:{ // 提交参数键值对
			search:'系统', // 搜索关键字
			captcha:'' // 识别为空的关键字为验证码
	 }
	})
	搜索关键字不从网页获取就用java.put('key',key)和java.get('key')
	已经很简单了，再不会打屁屁
	*/
if(try_times>=max_try){break}
try_times+=1
}
result
</js>

searchUrl:
<js> var body = {
  "sort": "default",
  "page": 1,
  "q": "{{key}}",
  "rootKind": "",
  "query": "
    query getFilterWorksList($works_ids: [ID!]) {
      worksList(worksIds: $works_ids) {
        
    
    title
    cover
    url
    isBundle
    coverLabel
  
    
    url
    title
  
    
    author {
      name
      url
    }
    origAuthor {
      name
      url
    }
    translator {
      name
      url
    }
  
    
    abstract
    editorHighlight
  
    
    isOrigin
    kinds {
      
    name @skip(if: true)
    shortName @include(if: true)
    id
  
    }
    ... on WorksBase @include(if: true) {
      wordCount
      wordCountUnit
    }
    ... on WorksBase @include(if: false) {
      
    isEssay
    
    ... on EssayWorks {
      favorCount
    }
  
    
    isNew
    
    averageRating
    ratingCount
    url
  
  
  
    }
    ... on WorksBase @include(if: false) {
      isColumn
      isEssay
      onSaleTime
      ... on ColumnWorks {
        updateTime
      }
    }
    ... on WorksBase @include(if: true) {
      isColumn
      ... on ColumnWorks {
        isFinished
      }
    }
    ... on EssayWorks {
      essayActivityData {
        
    title
    uri
    tag {
      name
      color
      background
      icon2x
      icon3x
      iconSize {
        height
      }
      iconPosition {
        x y
      }
    }
  
      }
    }
    highlightTags {
      name
    }
  
    isInLibrary
    ... on WorksBase @include(if: false) {
      
    fixedPrice
    salesPrice
    isRebate
  
    }
    ... on EbookWorks {
      
    fixedPrice
    salesPrice
    isRebate
  
    }
    ... on WorksBase @include(if: true) {
      ... on EbookWorks {
        id
        isPurchased
        isInWishlist
      }
    }
  
        id
        isOrigin
      }
    }
  ",
  "variables": {}
};
var option = {"method": "POST", "body": JSON.stringify(body) }; "https://read.douban.com/j/search_v2," + JSON.stringify(option) </js>

loginUrl:
<js>
var login = () => {
    var username = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("账号");
    var password = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("密码");
    var res = java.post(
      'https://kmh004.net/login',
        JSON.stringify({
            1_email: username,
            1_password: password,
        }),
        {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    );
    source.putLoginHeader(JSON.stringify({
        Authorization: `Bearer ${res.body()}`
    }));
}
login();
</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
if(result.match(/請勿瀏覽及購買本館商品，本網站已依照台灣網站內容分級規定處理。/)){
url=baseUrl+'/limit18';
value=result.match(/name="_poporf-tk001" value="([^"]+)">/)[1];

Cookie=String(java.getCookie(baseUrl,null));
body='cid=&type=&_poporf-tk001='+value;

cookies=java.post(url,body,{"cookie":Cookie}).cookies();

Cookies=String(cookies).match(/\{(.*?)\}/)[1]+'; '+Cookie;

header={"Cookie":String(Cookies)}
headers={"headers":JSON.stringify(header)}
java.put('header',JSON.stringify(headers));
Url=baseUrl+','+JSON.stringify(headers);
result=String(java.ajax(Url))
}else{result=result}
</js>

<js>
let res = JSON.parse(result)
let books

if (res.search_tabs) {
  res.search_tabs.forEach((i) => {
    if (i.tab_type == 3) books = i.data
  })
} else books = res.data

let results = []

books.forEach(w => {
  results.push(w.book_data[0])
})

JSON.stringify(results)
</js>$[*]

searchRule.bookList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(result)
let books

if (res.search_tabs) {
  res.search_tabs.forEach((i) => {
    if (i.tab_type == 3) books = i.data
  })
} else books = res.data

let results = []

books.forEach(w => {
  results.push(w.book_data[0])
})

JSON.stringify(results)
</js>$[*]

} else {
  book.type = 8;
}
result
